¶ Private insurance includes respondents with health insurance from Healthcare.gov Health Insurance Marketplace and Tricare or other military insurance; public insurance includes those on Medicaid, Medicare, Indian Health Service, or any other tribal insurance; and no insurance includes respondents who did not have insurance at any time during their youngest child’s birth and those who self-paid.
** Highest level of formal education completed at time of survey was defined as less than high school, high school diploma or equivalent, or more than a high school diploma. More than a high school diploma includes respondents with some college education, an associate degree or technical school, a bachelor’s degree, a master’s degree, or a professional degree or doctorate.
